_meta.purpose: Stage 7 Patterns 的降级模板：当 Agent 无法基于 persona 生成 8-10 条 MBTI 匹配句型时，使用此 8 条 MBTI-agnostic 通用句型填充。
_meta.usage: Agent 应优先生成带 fits_mbti 字段的个性化 patterns；降级时引用本文件并在 skill_manifest.stages[patterns].note 中注明 'fallback-patterns used'。

patterns.skeleton: Well, when I think about _____, the first thing that comes to mind is _____.
patterns.example_from_anchor: A-XX: Well, when I think about ICPC, the first thing that comes to mind is the 12-hour debugging night.

patterns.skeleton: There are two main reasons: first, _____; and second, _____.
patterns.example_from_anchor: A-XX: There are two main reasons: first, it's really hands-on; and second, it pays off fast.

patterns.skeleton: On one hand, _____, but on the other hand, _____.
patterns.example_from_anchor: A-XX: On one hand, the course is intense, but on the other hand, you grow the fastest there.

patterns.skeleton: What really stood out to me was _____ because _____.
patterns.example_from_anchor: A-XX: What really stood out to me was the silence in the cockpit because it meant everyone was fully focused.

patterns.skeleton: So overall, _____ has shaped the way I _____ .
patterns.example_from_anchor: A-XX: So overall, that project has shaped the way I approach any open-ended problem.

patterns.skeleton: To give you a concrete example, _____.
patterns.example_from_anchor: A-XX: To give you a concrete example, we had to rewrite the whole module in one night.

patterns.skeleton: It wasn't so much _____ as it was _____.
patterns.example_from_anchor: A-XX: It wasn't so much the difficulty as it was the pressure of the deadline.

patterns.skeleton: Funnily enough, _____ which I hadn't expected at all.
patterns.example_from_anchor: A-XX: Funnily enough, that trip turned into my biggest learning experience, which I hadn't expected at all.
